title: Common Idioms
topics: body idioms · time · feelings · work · everyday idioms
description: Nejběžnější anglické idiomy — výrazy, které nelze přeložit doslova.

vocabulary.en: cost an arm and a leg
hit the nail on the head
kill two birds with one stone
let the cat out of the bag

examples.en: Every cloud has a silver lining.
examples.cz: Každá zlá věc je k něčemu dobrá.

examples.en: It was a blessing in disguise — losing that job led to a better one.
examples.cz: Bylo to skryté požehnání — ztráta té práce vedla k lepší.

examples.en: We arrived in the nick of time — the train was just leaving.
examples.cz: Přijeli jsme na poslední chvíli — vlak právě odjížděl.

examples.en: Are you pulling my leg, or did you really win?
examples.cz: Děláš si ze mě legraci, nebo jsi opravdu vyhrál?

quiz.sentence: It's ___ cats and dogs outside — take an umbrella.
He told a joke to ___ the ice at the meeting.
I only see her once in a ___ moon.
She burned the ___ oil to finish the report.

tasks: 1. Choose 5 idioms and use each in your own sentence about real life
2. Find 3 idioms you've heard in films or songs — look up their meanings
3. Write a short story using at least 6 idioms from this lesson
